_README: Fixture ledger for srs-ledger-reconcile. The 2026-01-15 entry below is deliberately STALE — it holds a different headword set than the fixture DE file (de/2026-01-15.html teaches kochen + die suppe). Running the reconcile in --write against this should replace the entry in place (no duplicate date) with [kochen, die suppe], preserving theme. A second 2026-01-15 entry is intentionally absent; an older date is included to prove newest-first sort + that other entries are untouched.
